agenda.agenda_title: Gabrielle Ricci and DD&T LT Visit
agenda.theme: Leadership alignment, ICC overview, capability showcase, and strategic dialogue
assumptions: Visit is planned as a 3-day executive visit based on catalog default.
Gabrielle Ricci is the primary visitor and is included in all visitor-facing sessions.
DD&T LT refers to the Data & AI leadership team and is the main internal audience for leadership sessions.
missing_information: Exact visit dates not provided; agenda is date-agnostic.
Any specific DD&T LT attendees beyond the leadership team are not listed.
open_questions: What are the exact visit dates for Day 1-3?
Should Gabrielle Ricci attend all sessions or only leadership-facing blocks?
Are there any must-include business areas or projects for the DD&T LT visit?
Do you want an offsite dinner or employee townhall included?

days.day_title: DD&T Leaders Interaction with Local Talent

sessions.description: Reception at ICC India with site access, greetings, and a brief orientation. Sets the tone for DD&T leadership engagement with local teams.
Leadership connect with the ICC Leadership Team to align on priorities, site context, and expectations for the visit. Enables focused discussion with Gab and local LT.

sessions.agenda_topic: CFT Family Pizza with Jennifer West (90 pax)
sessions.description: Informal engagement with Jennifer West and the CFT team over lunch. Designed to build connection and celebrate local talent participation.
sessions.location: ICC India Café / CFT Team Area

sessions.description: Culture and Values Group lunch with Gab and CVG members. Highlights employee engagement, culture building, and local community initiatives.

sessions.agenda_topic:
Demo on Enterprise Learning and Connected Data 
Ecosystem
sessions.description: Showcase of the enterprise learning ecosystem and how connected data capabilities can support smarter learning, insights, and scalable decision-making. The session will demonstrate how integrated platforms enable better visibility, collaboration, and business impact.
sessions.attendees: Sanjay Patel, Gabriele Ricci, Amanda Lawlor, Chakra Ithayamani

sessions.description: Small-group interaction with selected colleagues for open discussion with Gab. Focused on talent stories, questions, and leadership connection.
Second small-group interaction to extend leadership access to another selected cohort. Creates space for candid exchange and local talent visibility.

days.day_title: Exploring how ICC India’s capabilities can accelerate the next phase of GCM expansion for IBU
days.day_theme: Deep dive into data and AI capabilities

sessions.description: Reception at ICC India with access support and transition to Himalaya. Prepares visiting leaders for the Day 2 capability immersion.
Introductions, visit objectives, and framing of the strategic opportunity for GCM expansion through ICC capabilities. Aligns leaders on the flow and expected outcomes.
Guided transition to the innovation space and walkthrough of key ICC areas. Helps leaders experience the environment, collaboration spaces, and site culture.
sessions.attendees: Esha, Visiting Leaders, Tilak, Nara, RK, Simeon

sessions.agenda_topic: Transforming Market Access Through AI & Automation
sessions.description: Showcase of integrated data, AI, and automation capabilities that streamline Market Access and Pricing operations. Demonstrates scalable business transformation opportunities.
sessions.attendees: Angelaa Kaur, Arpit, Nara, RK, Simeon

sessions.description: Break with transition to the 11th floor and informal walkthrough of PDT labs. Provides leaders with a brief immersion into ICC innovation spaces.

sessions.agenda_topic: Building Scalable Data Products and Foundations for IBU
sessions.description: Overview of TODAI, I4I, Data Pulse, and MDM as connected insight and data foundation enablers. Shows how these platforms support future-ready business capabilities.
Short movement and refreshment buffer between capability sessions. Keeps the agenda flowing while enabling informal leadership conversations.

sessions.agenda_topic: CEE–Commercial Chapter Partnership, CXF Enablement, and Talent Readiness
sessions.description: Showcase of CEE–Commercial chapter partnership, CXF platform enablement, and ICC talent readiness. Focuses on how ICC can help scale CXF globally.
sessions.attendees: Nara, Subhajit, JP, Kunal Sen, Jagan, Sumanan Bh, Srijita D, Nitiyasree

sessions.agenda_topic: Leadership Roundtable Lunch with ICC Digital Associates
sessions.description: Interactive networking lunch enabling small-group discussions between IBU leaders and ICC digital talent. Explores innovation culture, career journeys, and workforce models supporting GCM growth.
Transition to the 12th floor with walkthrough of Udaan Horizon, collaboration spaces, and the Tech Bar. Highlights practical innovation spaces across ICC.

sessions.agenda_topic: AI Forward: Scaling Enterprise Productivity Through AI
sessions.description: Showcase of AI-enabled development and engineering capabilities accelerating DD&T productivity. Includes live demonstrations supporting R&D innovation.
Experience tour covering ICC culture and engagement spaces. Includes Intangible Bonds Wall and CVG overview to connect innovation with community.
Short break and transition back to the 11th floor before the enterprise content showcase. Provides a reset before the closing capability sessions.

sessions.agenda_topic: Showcasing Enterprise Content Innovation Capabilities Built in ICC
sessions.description: Showcase of ICC-built enterprise content innovation capabilities and their role in scalable content operations. Covers reuse, speed, quality, and business impact.
sessions.attendees: Rahul Mohan, Tiana Hosmani, Sebastian Lipp, Visiting Leaders

sessions.description: Roundtable with industry and strategic partners on GCC ecosystem evolution, innovation trends, talent, and future capability centers. Brings external perspective into ICC growth planning.
Discussion on strategic insights from the immersion experience and opportunities to accelerate the next phase of GCM expansion for IBU. Captures reflections and follow-up priorities.
Coordinated transition from ICC to the dinner venue for visiting leaders and ICC hosts. Ensures smooth movement and timely arrival.
Leadership dinner to continue informal dialogue and relationship-building between visiting LT and ICC India LT. Focused on reflections, alignment, and next-step opportunities.
Depart from Hotel Leela to Accenture Innovation Hub, Bellandur. Destination: Building 14, Pritech Park, Pritech Road, Adarsh Palm Retreat, Bengaluru.
sessions.attendees: Gab, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda Lawlor, Aneel, RK

sessions.description: Opening welcome at Accenture with brief introductions and visit orientation. Establishes context before the innovation hub sessions begin.
Overview of Accenture’s platform-led delivery model with supporting demos. Shows how delivery accelerators support scale, speed, and quality.

sessions.agenda_topic: Changing the Way We Work Across Cost, Speed, Risk, Talent, and Technology
sessions.description: Working session on current operating pressures across cost, speed, risk, talent, and technology. Focuses on practical ways to evolve delivery and collaboration.
Short refreshment pause at Accenture before the commitment and readiness discussions. Allows leaders to reset and continue informal conversations.

sessions.agenda_topic: What Needs to Be True – Our Commitment to Each Other
sessions.description: Joint alignment discussion on mutual expectations, ways of working, and shared commitments. Clarifies what is required to make the partnership effective.

sessions.agenda_topic: Transition Approach and Confirming Service Readiness
sessions.description: Review of transition plan, handover approach, dependencies, and service readiness criteria. Ensures teams are aligned before execution.
Lunch break at Accenture for visiting leaders and hosts. Provides informal networking space before the afternoon use-case discussion.
Discussion of use cases beyond AMS/IMS to identify broader collaboration and innovation opportunities. Explores future-facing business value areas.
Recap of key decisions, open items, and next steps from the Accenture visit. Closes the session with aligned follow-ups and ownership.

briefing_rows.day_title: DD&T Leaders Interaction with Local Talent
briefing_rows.day_theme: Welcome and executive context setting
briefing_rows.description: Reception at ICC India with site access, greetings, and a brief orientation. Sets the tone for DD&T leadership engagement with local teams.
briefing_rows.briefing_book_disc: Welcome, Arrival. Catalog note: Always day 1 first slot.
briefing_rows.display_description: Guests are welcomed at ICC India with site access support, greetings, and a brief orientation to the day ahead. The opening sets a warm and polished tone for the visit while easing the transition into the first leadership engagements. This reception also creates a natural starting point for the broader briefing flow, giving visiting leaders an immediate sense of place and preparing them for the conversations and sessions that follow with local teams.

The opening sets a warm and polished tone for the visit while easing the transition into the first leadership engagements. This reception also creates a natural starting point for the broader briefing flow, giving visiting leaders an immediate sense of place and preparing them for the conversations and sessions that follow with local teams. Hosted by Sanjay / ICC Host.
